case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. WAN BUI CHENG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-15-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 AND EVERY 6 MONTHS THEREAFTER FOR PROGRESS REPORTS.
